hero:
# Sports Analytics Dashboard

**Player performance modeling & valuation · Python · Pandas · Scikit-learn · Dash · GCP**

## Hero Overview

A two-part sports analytics build: a soccer player-performance dashboard scaling a reusable cleaning pipeline to 100K+ datapoints across 22 attributes, and a cross-sport (FIFA × NBA) player-valuation model benchmarking 25K+ records over 5 seasons.

Both ship as interactive Dash/Plotly apps on GCP, turning raw player data into model-backed comparison views and scouting/pricing inputs for non-technical coaching and club-side stakeholders.

points.evidence: Reusable normalization pipeline scaling to 100K+ player datapoints, enabling re-runs against new seasons without manual rework.
Engineered 22 soccer attributes and 20+ cross-sport features with Pandas/Scikit-learn, applying PCA to lift model interpretability.
Multivariate Linear Regression reaching ~97% accuracy on player projection and ~85% R² on market-value prediction.
Integrated 25K+ FIFA records across 5 seasons with NBA OBPM/DBPM metrics into one valuation-benchmarking dataset.
Interactive time-series dashboards on Dash, Plotly and GCP, replacing static spreadsheet workflows for coaching staff.

network_graph.description: Maps the project's core techniques to the tools used to implement them.

storyline:
# Storyline

## Context

Coaching and scouting decisions leaned on static spreadsheets that buried player-performance signal and made cross-season or cross-league comparison slow and manual.

## Workflow

Raw player data → reusable cleaning & integrity testing → feature engineering → regression modeling → interactive dashboards for comparison and valuation. The same pipeline backs both the soccer dashboard and the FIFA × NBA cross-sport valuation model.

## Technical Implementation

- **Cleaning pipeline:** reusable normalization (IQR outlier removal, Z-score, Kolmogorov-Smirnov testing) scaling to 100K+ datapoints across 22 attributes, re-runnable against new seasons.
- **Feature engineering:** 20+ statistical and contextual features with Pandas and Scikit-learn, PCA applied to reduce dimensionality and lift interpretability.
- **Modeling:** Multivariate Linear Regression reaching ~97% accuracy on player projection and ~85% R² on market-value prediction (~78% on performance-based valuation).
- **Cross-sport benchmarking:** integrated 25K+ FIFA records across 5 seasons with NBA OBPM/DBPM metrics into one valuation dataset.
- **Dashboards:** interactive time-series Dash/Plotly apps on GCP for real-time, side-by-side player comparison.

## Outcomes

Replaced static spreadsheet workflows with model-backed comparison views, translating 22-attribute outputs into priority insights for coaching staff and a scouting/pricing framework for club-side decision-makers.
